case_title: ERIKA ALTAMIRANO VS. JOSEPH T MOREIRA

docket_entries.description: APPLICATION AND DECLARATION FOR ORDER (DOMESTIC VIOLENCE) FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED ALTAMIRANO, ERIKA AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED MOREIRA, JOSEPH T

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE AND TEMPORARY RESTRAINING ORDER FILED BY PERSON TO BE PROTECTED ALTAMIRANO, ERIKA AS TO PERSON TO BE RESTRAINED MOREIRA, JOSEPH T HEARING SET FOR JUN-10-2002 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 404

STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE TEMPORARY JUDGE- MARJORIE A. SLABACH

(404/MAS) PARTIES IN PRO PER. NEITHER PARTY ATTENDED ORIENTATION. AS THIS IS D-V ACTION, COURT SENDS PARTIES TO FCS FOR MEDIATION. PARTIES RETURNED TO COURT WITHOUT MEDIATION AS THERE WERE NOT ENOUGH MEDIATORS.
